svg.text: Subaru Sambar TT2 — mph / km/h speedometer overlay (1:1)
PRINT AT 100% / ACTUAL SIZE - never 'fit to page'. Check both rules = 100.0 mm with calipers (each axis).
Test on plain paper and dry-fit over the plate before printing on matte white vinyl; laminate matte for UV.
Cut on the grey hairlines. Blue bleeds 1 mm past the outer cut line, so small cutting errors stay invisible.
Register by odometer window + spindle hole. Apertures are cut 0.4 mm oversize for clearance.
mph primary: majors 10, minors 5, end mark 85. Inner ring km/h. 0-20 km/h is non-linear; 10 mph is calibrated to it.
